project_name: Regime-Aware Tactical Allocation across Taiwan-Listed ETFs
_ticker_notes: 00679B is listed on the Taipei Exchange (TPEx / 櫃買中心), NOT TWSE main board.
Yahoo Finance uses .TWO for TPEx tickers and .TW for TWSE tickers.
Using the wrong suffix does not raise an error -- it silently returns empty data.
00635U is a futures-based gold ETF with ~1.5-2% annual roll cost embedded in price.
00679B is an UNHEDGED USD-denominated bond ETF -- TWD/USD moves affect its return.

download._start_note: Set earlier than any ETF listing date; the audit will find actual common start.

backtest._cost_note: ETF securities transaction tax is 0.1% (sell side), broker commission ~0.1425% (negotiable). Total round-trip ~25-35 bps before market impact.

cash_proxy._note: Approximate Taiwan 1-year time deposit rate. Replace with actual rate series if available.
